title: Space/set: create, update, and destroy Spaces
description:
Implement Space/set in methods/space.rs:
- Create: name, description, avatarBlobId, membershipPolicy (open/invite/closed), initial memberIds
- Update: name, description, avatarBlobId, membershipPolicy, memberPermissions (role -> [permission] map)
- Destroy: hard-delete if no members; handle constraint errors
- Handle SetErrors: invalidProperties, notFound, forbidden, overQuota
- Fixture tests: create, update, destroy, forbidden

Fixture files: tests/fixtures/space_set_*.json
close_reason: superseded by jmap-chat-tui-x2d (Space methods epic, already implemented)
